channel.title: computer-vision on Chaitanya Patel
channel.description: Recent content in computer-vision on Chaitanya Patel

item.title: Attention Modeling for Image Captioning
item.description: Implemented Visual Attention in CNN-RNN architecture for image captioning described in paper Show, Attend and Tell achieving the state of the art accuracy on MSCOCO dataset.

item.title: Content Aware Image Resizing
item.description: Matlab implementation of Seam Carving algorithm for image upsizing, downsizing and object removal. Two types of cost functions were implemented - pixel entropy cost and image gradient cost.

item.title: Relative Attributes
item.description: Implemented Visual Relative Attributes and Rank SVM for image classification and zero-shot learning based on ECCV-2011 best paper Relative Attributes.

item.title: Spectral Image Matching
item.description: Implemented Joint Spectral Correspondence proposed in a CVPR-2013 paper to match the images with disparate appearance arising from dramatic illumination (day vs night), age (historic vs new) and rendering style differences.

item.title: VAE for Image Generation
item.description: Implemented Variational Autoencoder generative model in Keras for image generation and its latent space visualization on MNIST and CIFAR10 datasets.
